title: Cuneiform Tablet #0145: Ur III Mathematical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a mathematical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a mathematical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Ur III period. Mathematical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records mathematical matters typical of Ur III period administrative or literary practice.
